name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
archDisplay: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Transformer with native always-on thinking
note: First Gemini with always-on thinking; #1 on LMArena at launch; official deprecation announced with successor gemini-3.1-pro-preview, shutdown scheduled ~Oct 2026.

results.notes: Humanity's Last Exam, no tools, SOTA at launch
GPQA Diamond, single attempt, Gemini 2.5 Pro (Experimental 03-25) column.
AIME 2025, single attempt, Gemini 2.5 Pro (Experimental 03-25) column.
LiveCodeBench v5 (UI window 10/1/2024-2/1/2025), single attempt, Gemini 2.5 Pro (Experimental 03-25) column.
Aider Polyglot, whole score (74.0% whole / 68.6% diff), Gemini 2.5 Pro (Experimental 03-25) column.
MMMU, single attempt, Gemini 2.5 Pro (Experimental 03-25) column.

verificationNotes: Fetched the primary blog.google launch post directly: confirmed publish date March 25, 2025 (updated Mar 26), and the exact HLE 18.8%, SWE-bench 63.8%, and '#1 on LMArena by a significant margin' quotes verbatim. Independently confirmed the deprecation claim via ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/deprecations live table: gemini-2.5-pro shutdown date is Oct 16, 2026, recommended replacement is gemini-3.1-pro-preview (a real, released model, confirmed via ai.google.dev model docs and Google Cloud blog) — matches the record's note exactly. Pricing $1.25/$10 confirmed on ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing. Architecture 'sparse MoE transformer' confirmed via the official Gemini 2.5 Flash/3 Pro model cards' Architecture section (applies to the whole 2.5/3 family). No corrections needed.
